ab: i tjumaq ti vuvu a vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: izua, na taqed i qumaqan.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: i tjumaq ti vuvu a vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: neka i tjumq, tjauvaik a sasaw nu qzemetj ki tjumaq.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: i tjumaq ti vuvu a uqaljay?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ita tjayvavau a kinayzuan, savavavu a karim timdju.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: izua cacau i tjumaq ？
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: a, ti Kuliu lja, sicuyan anga ljinengeljengan tjanusun, nanguanguaq sun?
ch: B:是Kuliu阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Kuliu. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: nanguanguaq aen lja! mangtjez aen tu makakay tjanusun.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: inuan ti tjama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: cemalcala tua djamay i kakesan timadju, u vaikau a qemaqivu.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: mainu anga ti Tjuku?
en: Where did Tjuku go?

ab: na vaik a sema pudjurikukuan a djemameq tua djurikuku.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: vuvu uqaljay, mangtjez anga men.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: neka i tjumaq a nu vuvu a uqaljay, i kavuavuan timadju, kaljavau i tjumaq timdju dri!
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mangtjez anga sun ama i Kuliu dri!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: cuacuay anga ljinengeljengan tjanusun, na meqaca nga sun.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: pacunan sun a mangtjez, maru maleva en. 。
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: u sinipavay cu a pangudralj tjanumun, pasa pinsiang ngu!
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: sicuayan anga su pinangtjezan, u qaivuau a mapuljat tu mangtjez a keman.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: saldji tu pukakudan, temkel aen tua uciya, ari a matua papasedjaluan a makakay.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: masalu tua su pinasedjaluan, uri tjumaq anga en.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: tjauculjuin cu a djurikuku, kacu a tjumaq sa galjuyanga keman.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
